name: Grounded Pure Soap Kenyan Castile Soap Unscented 5l
shortDescription: This multi-purpose liquid soap is all-natural, and all-purpose for every cleaning need. No imported oils in our recipe! Just pure-Kenyan grown ingredients. Our All-Kenyan Castile soap is concentrated to last – a little product goes a long way!
description: All-purpose Kenyan Castile Soap. Castile soap is a vegan, vegetable oil-based soap. This neutral, all-purpose soap is so natural you can use it on anything! This multi-purpose liquid soap is all-natural, and all-purpose for every cleaning need. No imported oils in our recipe! Just pure-Kenyan grown ingredients. Our All-Kenyan Castile soap is concentrated to last – a little product goes a long way! Pure Soap siblings are now available in more fun formulations specifically for: Use 30ml for mopping and a few drops for surfaces. Ingredients: Saponified coconut, sunflower, canola oils; Citric Acid, Essential Oils
